title: Scasa: Isoform-level Quantification for Single-Cell RNA Sequencing
author: Pan, Lu
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Implementation of Scasa, an isoform-level quantification method for high-throughput single-cell RNA sequencing data and a test dataset.
steps_raw: Implementation of Scasa, an isoform-level quantification method for high-throughput single-cell RNA sequencing data and a test dataset.
